news.title: The Strait of Hormuz is not open as Iran controls access after ceasefire, UAE oil CEO says
news.summary: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber demanded a full reopening of the Strait. He warned that the oil supply disruption will increase if Iran maintains control of the passage.

news.title: Inflation held sticky at 3% as U.S. headed into war with Iran, key Fed gauge shows
news.summary: The gauge offers the Federal Reserve a snapshot of conditions leading into the Iran war. The gauge released Thursday offers the Fed a snapshot into the conditions leading up to the war.

news.title: Trump says U.S. ready for 'next conquest,' warns military to remain near Iran until 'real agreement' is honored
news.summary: The statement came a day after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire. The ceasefire was brokered by Pakistan, which halted six weeks of fighting.

news.title: Disney plans layoffs of as many as 1,000 employees
news.summary: Disney is planning a new phase of cost cutting, including as many as 1,000 layoffs, according to a person familiar with the matter.

news.title: American Airlines makes bag fees even more expensive for basic economy tickets
news.summary: American Airlines is joining Delta, United, Southwest and JetBlue in raising its checked bag fees. The move is in response to high jet fuel prices.

news.title: The $250 million daily bet: How the Iran crisis triggered a frenzy in leveraged oil trades
news.summary: Interest leveraged or inverse ETFs are taking off. Investors have sought new ways to take advantage of volatile energy prices. The interest leveraged and inverseETFs are popular with investors.

news.title: We’re in our 70s with no heirs. I like donating $30,000 from our $700,000 IRA to charity — my husband disagrees. Who’s right?
news.summary: “Our income — Social Security, his VA disability and three pensions — covers all expenses,” she says. “Our Income — Social security, hisVA disability and 3 pensions — cover all expenses.”

news.title: Intel’s stock is set to extend its hot streak. Here’s the company’s latest win.
news.summary: Google and Intel are collaborating on CPUs and custom infrastructure chips to scale AI. Google and Intel have been working together on AI chips for years. The two companies are teaming up to develop new chips for AI.

news.title: You think Iran is only about oil? No, it’s also about your dinner table.
news.summary: Four food-supply chokeholds are squeezing investor portfolios. Here’s what to do before your grocery bill proves it in October.

news.title: ‘Several hurricanes have come close’: I’m 73 and live in a mobile home in Florida. Do I ditch my $2,400 home insurance?
news.summary: “I live in a 2016 double-wide mobile home with no mortgage,” she says. “I’m a single mother of two. I’ve never had a mortgage.”
